name: motadata-sdk-pipeline
description: NFR-driven SDK-addition pipeline. Six-phase orchestration (Intake → Design → Implementation → Testing → Documentation → Feedback) with HITL gates, devil-fleet design review, learning-engine self-improvement, and per-language packs (Go, Python, extensible). Ships ~80 agents, ~50 skills, 2 slash commands, 1 PostToolUse hook.
